technology.title: Ad for AI editing app which said it could 'remove anything' banned
technology.summary: The UK regulator said the ad condoned "digitally altering and exposing women's bodies without their consent."

briefing.news_focus: The UK regulator said the ad condoned "digitally altering and exposing women's bodies without their consent."
briefing.news_focus_zh: The UK regulator said the ad condoned "digitally altering and exposing women's bodies without their consent."
briefing.background: 此議題通常涉及生成式 AI、模型能力競爭、算力供應，以及商業化與監管之間的平衡。
briefing.analysis: 核心角力在於誰能掌握模型能力、算力資源與商業應用場景，同時控制成本與政策風險。

technology.title: Luke Littler applies to trademark his face to combat AI fakes
technology.summary: The darts star's image has been used legally on darts merchandise, snacks and fashion brands.

briefing.news_focus: The darts star's image has been used legally on darts merchandise, snacks and fashion brands.
briefing.news_focus_zh: The darts star's image has been used legally on darts merchandise, snacks and fashion brands.
briefing.background: 此議題通常涉及生成式 AI、模型能力競爭、算力供應，以及商業化與監管之間的平衡。
briefing.analysis: 核心角力在於誰能掌握模型能力、算力資源與商業應用場景，同時控制成本與政策風險。

politics.title: Russian drone attack kills two in Ukraine ahead of talks in US, officials say
politics.summary: Two children, aged 11 and 15 were also injured in the attack which took place in Zaporizhzhia.

briefing.news_focus: Two children, aged 11 and 15 were also injured in the attack which took place in Zaporizhzhia.
briefing.news_focus_zh: Two children, aged 11 and 15 were also injured in the attack which took place in Zaporizhzhia.
briefing.background: 安全與衝突議題通常牽涉軍事風險、外交回應、能源與市場連動效應。
briefing.analysis: 主要角力在於軍事升高風險、外交降溫空間與國際成本分攤。

politics.title: Socialists battle to hold Paris in key mayoral elections across France
politics.summary: Emmanuel Grégoire is facing a challenge from Rachida Dati on the right who is behind in the opinion polls.

briefing.news_focus: Emmanuel Grégoire is facing a challenge from Rachida Dati on the right who is behind in the opinion polls.
briefing.news_focus_zh: Emmanuel Grégoire is facing a challenge from Rachida Dati on the right who is behind in the opinion polls.
briefing.background: 選舉新聞通常反映政策方向、民意結構與權力重新分配的可能性。
briefing.analysis: 核心角力在於議題設定能力、民意動員與選後政策可執行性。

economy.title: US holds interest rates as Iran war triggers inflation fears
economy.summary: The US central bank is moving cautiously, despite pressure from the president to cut interest rates.

briefing.news_focus: The US central bank is moving cautiously, despite pressure from the president to cut interest rates.
briefing.news_focus_zh: The US central bank is moving cautiously, despite pressure from the president to cut interest rates.
briefing.background: 利率相關議題通常反映央行對通膨、成長與金融穩定之間的取捨。
briefing.analysis: 核心角力在於壓抑通膨、維持經濟活動與控制金融市場波動。

economy.title: UK borrowing costs hit highest level since 2008 financial crisis
economy.summary: The interest rate on government debt is climbing over fears about inflation, interest rates, and public spending, experts have said.

briefing.news_focus: The interest rate on government debt is climbing over fears about inflation, interest rates, and public spending, experts have said.
